languages.text: "Казни фон Валанциуса? Чепуха! Грехов за нами немало, но крови Валанциусов среди них нет. Напротив. Случись что с господином Себерианом или его дочкой — мы бы с вами уже не разговаривали. Мы им щит. Первый удар — по нам." {n}Сержант разминает плечи, будто и впрямь ждет нападения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Казни фон Валанциуса? Чепуха! Грехов за нами немало, но крови Валанциусов среди них нет. Напротив. Случись что с господином Себерианом или его дочкой — мы бы с вами уже не разговаривали. Мы им щит. Первый удар — по нам." {n}Сержант разминает плечи, будто и впрямь ждет нападения.{/n}

languages.text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

languages.text: “处决冯·瓦兰修斯家族的人？开什么玩笑！我们的确有不少污点，可手上从未沾过冯·瓦兰修斯家族的血。恰恰相反，要是塞贝里安大人或是他的女儿出了什么事，我现在也不可能站在这儿跟你说话。我们是他们的盾牌，要是遇袭，我们是最先遭殃的。”{n}军士挺起胸膛，一副当真在迎战的架势。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “处决冯·瓦兰修斯家族的人？开什么玩笑！我们的确有不少污点，可手上从未沾过冯·瓦兰修斯家族的血。恰恰相反，要是塞贝里安大人或是他的女儿出了什么事，我现在也不可能站在这儿跟你说话。我们是他们的盾牌，要是遇袭，我们是最先遭殃的。”{n}军士挺起胸膛，一副当真在迎战的架势。{/n}

languages.text: « Mais c'est absurde, enfin ! Je ne peux pas prétendre être blanc comme neige, mais je n'ai jamais versé le sang des von Valancius, bien au contraire. S'il était arrivé quelque chose au seigneur Seberian ou à sa fille, je ne serais plus là pour vous parler. Nous sommes le bouclier de cette noble famille. C'est sur nous que les attaques s'abattent en premier. » {n}Le sergent redresse les épaules comme s'il s'attendait réellement à être attaqué.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

S'il était arrivé quelque chose au seigneur Seberian ou à sa fille, je ne serais plus là pour vous parler. Nous sommes le bouclier de cette noble famille. C'est sur nous que les attaques s'abattent en premier. » {n}Le sergent redresse les épaules comme s'il s'attendait réellement à être attaqué.{/n}

languages.text: "Bir Von Valancius'un idamı mı? Saçmalık! Adımıza sürülmüş bir sürü kara leke var ama von Valancius kanı dökmüşlüğüm yoktur. Hatta tam tersi. Lord Seberian'a veya kızına bir şey olsaydı burada dikilip sizinle konuşuyor olmazdım. Biz onların kalkanıyız. İlk darbe bize iner." {n}Çavuş, sanki gerçekten bir saldırı bekliyormuş gibi omuzlarını dikleştiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

Lord Seberian'a veya kızına bir şey olsaydı burada dikilip sizinle konuşuyor olmazdım. Biz onların kalkanıyız. İlk darbe bize iner." {n}Çavuş, sanki gerçekten bir saldırı bekliyormuş gibi omuzlarını dikleştiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿La ejecución de un von Valancius? ¡No diga tonterías! Se nos acusa de muchas cosas, pero derramar sangre de von Valancius no es una de ellas. Es más, todo lo contrario. Si algo le hubiera pasado a lord Seberian o a su hija, no estaría hablando con usted aquí. Somos su escudo. El primer golpe recae sobre nosotros». {n}El sargento se prepara, como si de verdad estuviera esperando un ataque.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿La ejecución de un von Valancius? ¡No diga tonterías! Se nos acusa de muchas cosas, pero derramar sangre de von Valancius no es una de ellas. Es más, todo lo contrario. Si algo le hubiera pasado a lord Seberian o a su hija, no estaría hablando con usted aquí. Somos su escudo. El primer golpe recae sobre nosotros». {n}El sargento se prepara, como si de verdad estuviera esperando un ataque.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr habt einen von Valancius exekutiert? Macht Euch nicht lächerlich! Unser Name ist mit so manchem Makel verbunden, aber Valancius-Blut haben wir noch nie vergossen. Ganz im Gegenteil. Wäre Lord Seberian oder seiner Tochter etwas zugestoßen, stünde ich jetzt nicht hier. Wir sind ihr Schild. Der erste Angriff gilt uns." {n}Der Sergeant spannt die Schultern an, als würde er einen Angriff erwarten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Executed a von Valancius? Don't be absurd! We have a fair few black marks against our name, but shedding von Valancius blood isn't one of them. The opposite, in fact. If something had happened to Lord Seberian or his daughter, I wouldn't be standing here talking to you. We're their shield. The first strike lands on us." {n}The sergeant squares his shoulders as if he is genuinely expecting an attack.{/n}

Der erste Angriff gilt uns." {n}Der Sergeant spannt die Schultern an, als würde er einen Angriff erwarten.{/n}

languages.text: 「バルアンシウスを処刑したのですか？そんな馬鹿な！我々は悪名高いですが、バルアンシウス家の血を流したことはありません。むしろ、その逆です。もしセベリアン卿やその娘に何かあったら、私はここに立ってあなたと話すことはできません。我々は彼らの盾です。最初の攻撃は我々に当たります。」{n}警部補は真に攻撃を期待しているかのように、肩を真っ直ぐに構えます。{/n}
